issues.description: Duration should be 'UntilStartOfNextTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text explicitly states 'until the start of your next turn'
DrawCard action missing condition. Card text states 'if you have 1 or more Life cards' before drawing - this is a conditional action
RemoveLife action missing condition. Card text states 'if you have 1 or more Life cards' before trashing - this is a conditional action

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] This Character gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn. Then, if you have 1 or more Life cards, draw 1 card and trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards.
